metadata.description: Agent skills for building and managing with WSO2 products

plugins.name: api-platform
plugins.description: Skills for the WSO2 API Platform — design, assess, and fix OpenAPI specs for AI agent readiness, security, and design quality; then set up, publish, and manage APIs through the WSO2 API Gateway using the ap CLI.

plugins.name: identity-platform
plugins.description: Skills for the WSO2 Identity Platform — set up Asgardeo authentication end-to-end (CLI org configuration, OAuth2 app registration, SDK installation, and minimal login/logout integration) for React, Next.js, Vue, and Express apps.
